name: Indian Samosas
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Lean Beef Or Lamb, finely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the egg roll wrappers with a damp cloth until needed.
2. Mix the filling ingredients except the butter, lemon juice and herbs in a bowl.
3. Heat butter in a pan and fry the onions, garlic, and ginger until fragrant. Add the beef or lamb, curry powder, chili powder, turmeric, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 5 minutes until the meat is browned.
4. Stir in the cooked potato and peas, then cook for another 2-3 minutes until heated through.
5. Remove from heat, add lemon juice and herbs, and stir well. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Cut egg roll wrappers into strips about 1 3/4 inches wide.
7. To prepare samosas, fold each strip into a triangle by turning one end over to form a pocket.
8. Fill the pocket with a spoonful of the filling mixture and seal the edge with water or a paste made from flour and water.
9. Heat oil for deep frying until very hot (around 375°F/190°C).
10. Fry samosas in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
11. Serve hot with fresh mint chutney.
Makes approximately 36 samosas.
